title: Shat-tila Ekadashi
description: Madhava Masa (Magha), Krishna Paksha. Fast from grains till sunrise next day.

title: Bhaimi Ekadashi (Trisparsha Mahadvadashi)
description: Madhava Masa (Magha), Gaura Paksha. Special observance.

title: Vijaya Ekadashi
description: Govinda Masa (Phalguna), Krishna Paksha.

title: Amalaki Vrata Ekadashi
description: Govinda Masa (Phalguna), Gaura Paksha.

title: Papamochani Ekadashi
description: Vishnu Masa (Chaitra), Krishna Paksha.

title: Kamada Ekadashi
description: Vishnu Masa (Chaitra), Gaura Paksha.

title: Varuthini Ekadashi
description: Madhusudana Masa (Vaishakha), Krishna Paksha.

title: Mohini Ekadashi
description: Madhusudana Masa (Vaishakha), Gaura Paksha.

title: Apara Ekadashi
description: Trivikrama Masa (Jyeshtha), Krishna Paksha.

title: Padmini Ekadashi (Vyanjuli Mahadvadashi)
description: Adhika/Trivikrama Masa, Gaura Paksha.

title: Parama Ekadashi
description: Adhika/Trivikrama Masa, Krishna Paksha.

title: Pandava Nirjala Ekadashi
description: Trivikrama Masa (Jyeshtha), Gaura Paksha. Waterless fast.

title: Yogini Ekadashi
description: Vamana Masa (Ashadha), Krishna Paksha.

title: Sayana Ekadashi (Devshayani)
description: Vamana Masa (Ashadha), Gaura Paksha. Lord Vishnu begins yogic sleep — Chaturmasya begins.

title: Kamika Ekadashi (Trisparsha Mahadvadashi)
description: Shridhara Masa (Shravana), Krishna Paksha.

title: Pavitropana Ekadashi (Paksha Vardhini Mahadvadashi)
description: Shridhara Masa (Shravana), Gaura Paksha.

title: Annada Ekadashi
description: Hrishikesha Masa (Bhadra), Krishna Paksha.

title: Parshva Ekadashi (Parivartini)
description: Hrishikesha Masa (Bhadra), Gaura Paksha. Lord Vishnu turns over in His sleep.

title: Indira Ekadashi
description: Padmanabha Masa (Ashvina), Krishna Paksha.

title: Pashankusha Ekadashi
description: Padmanabha Masa (Ashvina), Gaura Paksha.

title: Rama Ekadashi
description: Damodara Masa (Kartika), Krishna Paksha.

title: Utthana Ekadashi (Prabodhini)
description: Damodara Masa (Kartika), Gaura Paksha. Lord Vishnu awakens — Chaturmasya ends.

title: Utpanna Ekadashi
description: Keshava Masa (Margashirsha), Krishna Paksha. Birth of Goddess Ekadashi.

title: Mokshada Ekadashi (Gita Jayanti)
description: Keshava Masa (Margashirsha), Gaura Paksha. Day Bhagavad-gita was spoken.

title: Sri Krishna Pushya Abhishek
description: Auspicious abhishek of Lord Sri Krishna.

title: Appearance — Srila Gopala Bhatta Goswami
description: One of the Six Goswamis of Vrindavan.

title: Disappearance — Sri Jayadeva Goswami
description: Author of Sri Gita Govinda.

title: Disappearance — Srila Locana Dasa Thakura
description: Author of Sri Caitanya Mangala.

title: Vasanta Panchami / Sri Visnupriya Devi Appearance
description: Appearance of Sri Sri Visnupriya Devi, Srila Pundarika Vidyanidhi, Srila Raghunatha Dasa Goswami.

title: Sri Gaura Purnima — Appearance of Sri Chaitanya Mahaprabhu
description: Most important festival of the Gaudiya Vaishnava year. Fast till moonrise.

title: Festival of Jagannatha Misra
description: Father of Sri Caitanya Mahaprabhu — celebration the day after Gaura Purnima.

title: Sri Rama Navami
description: Appearance of Lord Sri Ramachandra. Fasting till sunset.

title: Hanuman Jayanti
description: Appearance day of Sri Hanuman.

title: Beginning of Salagrama & Tulasi Jala-Dana
description: Daily offering of water to Tulasi Devi & Salagrama begins.

title: Akshaya Tritiya & Chandan Yatra begins
description: Sri Srinivasa Govinda Chandan Yatra begins.

title: Nrsimha Caturdasi — Appearance of Lord Nrsimhadeva
description: Fasting till dusk; offer abhishek to Lord Nrsimha.

title: End of Salagrama & Tulasi Jala-Dana
description: Concludes one month of water-offering to Tulasi Devi.

title: Srila Prabhupada Eka-Diksha-Guru Vijayotsava
description: Vishvaguru observance.

title: Panihati Chida-Dahi Utsava
description: Famous chipped-rice and yogurt festival of Sri Raghunatha Dasa Goswami.

title: Jagannatha Snana Yatra
description: Bathing festival of Lord Jagannatha.

title: Disappearance — Srila Bhaktivinoda Thakura
description: Founder of modern Gaudiya Vaishnava preaching.

title: Sri Jagannatha Ratha Yatra
description: Lord Jagannatha, Baladeva & Subhadra Devi travel to Gundicha temple.

title: Sudarshana Jayanti
description: Appearance of the Sudarshana Chakra.

title: Bahuda Ratha Yatra (Return)
description: Lord Jagannatha returns from Gundicha to Sri Mandir.

title: First month of Chaturmasya begins
description: Fast from leafy vegetables (shak) for one month.

title: Jhulan Yatra begins
description: Swing festival of Sri Sri Radha-Krishna.

title: Sri Balarama Jayanti / Jhulan Yatra ends
description: Appearance of Lord Balarama. Second month of Chaturmasya begins (fast from yogurt). Fast till noon.

title: Sri Krishna Janmashtami
description: Appearance of Lord Sri Krishna. Fast till midnight.

title: Nandotsava & Srila Prabhupada Vyasa Puja
description: Appearance of His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Srila Prabhupada. Fast till noon.

title: Sri Radhastami — Appearance of Srimati Radharani
description: Fast till noon.

title: Vamana Jayanti — Appearance of Lord Vamanadeva
description: Fast observed previous day till noon.

title: Appearance — Srila Bhaktivinoda Thakura
description: Fast till noon.

title: Third month of Chaturmasya begins
description: Fast from milk for one month.

title: Vijaya Dashami (Dasara)
description: Victory of Lord Rama over Ravana.

title: Fourth month of Chaturmasya / Karthika Deepotsava begins
description: Fast from urad dal; daily lamp offering to Sri Damodara begins.

title: Govardhana Puja & Go Puja
description: Worship of Sri Giri-Govardhana and the cows. Annakuta offering.

title: Disappearance — Srila Prabhupada
description: Disappearance day of His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Srila Prabhupada. Fast till noon.

title: Disappearance — Srila Gaura Kishora Dasa Babaji
description: Diksha-guru of Srila Bhaktisiddhanta Saraswati Thakura.

title: Last day of Chaturmasya & Deepotsava
description: Concludes the four months of austerity.

title: Srila Prabhupada Diksha Diwasa
description: Initiation day of Srila Prabhupada.

title: Disappearance — Srila Bhaktisiddhanta Saraswati Thakura
description: Spiritual master of Srila Prabhupada. Fast till noon.
